title: [CI:DOCS] Update dependency golangci/golangci-lint to v1.55.0
body:
[![Mend Renovate](https://app.renovatebot.com/images/banner.svg)](https://renovatebot.com)

This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|
| [golangci/golangci-lint](https://togithub.com/golangci/golangci-lint) | minor | `1.54.2` -> `1.55.0` |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>golangci/golangci-lint (golangci/golangci-lint)</summary>

### [`v1.55.0`](https://togithub.com/golangci/golangci-lint/releases/tag/v1.55.0)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/golangci/golangci-lint/compare/v1.54.2...v1.55.0)

-   [`4b188db`](https://togithub.com/golangci/golangci-lint/commit/4b188dbf) Add "inamedparam": checks for interface method with unnamed params ([#​3793](https://togithub.com/golangci/golangci-lint/issues/3793))
-   [`2d5d29f`](https://togithub.com/golangci/golangci-lint/commit/2d5d29f5) Add `testifylint` linter ([#​4103](https://togithub.com/golangci/golangci-lint/issues/4103))

I take a step to fix and/or disable new linters so we can update.

### Renovate Ignore Notification

Because you closed this PR without merging, Renovate will ignore this update (1.55.0). You will get a PR once a newer version is released. To ignore this dependency forever, add it to the `ignoreDeps` array of your Renovate config.

If you accidentally closed this PR, or if you changed your mind: rename this PR to get a fresh replacement PR.
